action_set_definitions.name: fetch_active_queue
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the list of all pending product listing IDs currently in the moderation queue.

action_set_definitions.name: get_listing_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves metadata and content analysis for a specific product listing, including seller origin, automated flags, and text analysis.

listing_id.description: The unique identifier of the product listing.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_moderation_action
action_set_definitions.description: Submits a moderation decision for a specific listing to the environment.

reasoning.description: Brief justification for the decision based on policy.

action_set_definitions.name: get_session_audit_log
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the history of all moderation actions taken during the current session to verify compliance and completion.

state_description.active_queue: A list of product listing objects currently awaiting moderation review.
state_description.moderation_history: An audit log containing records of previous actions, including timestamp, listing_id, and decision.
state_description.moderator_stats: Cumulative statistics for the current session, such as items_processed and average_time_per_item.
state_description.policy_rules: The set of moderation guidelines currently active in the environment (e.g., restricted keywords).

active_queue.title: Natural Essence - This tea magically cures all respiratory diseases
The world's most incredible tasting chocolate
